content.content:
- content: "Ticketmaster mobile-account scope registry:

- Scope code TM-CONSUMER-01\
    \ means the order is governed by the standard
  Ticketmaster consumer account\
    \ and standard Ticketmaster app path.

- Scope code TM-AM-SPORTS means the order\
    \ is governed by an official
  sports Account Manager account rather than the\
    \ standard Ticketmaster
  consumer account. Resolve the exact official account\
    \ host from the
  order's account namespace and an official Account Manager portal\
    \ source.

The scope code determines which account family has authority for\
    \ ticket
access. A Ticketmaster-branded standard app path must not be substituted
\
    for an active TM-AM-SPORTS assignment merely because the ticket was issued
through\
    \ Ticketmaster.
"

  url: null

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: SEC Account Manager

  - url: https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/

  - source: SEC Account Manager / Ticketmaster

  - domain: am.ticketmaster.com


  ## Content


  # SEC Account Manager


  The SEC Account Manager is the official SEC-branded account-management portal hosted
  on Ticketmaster''s Account Manager network.


  Its official account host is:


  `https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/`


  This page identifies the SEC account-management destination and its official host.
  It does not establish that every SEC-related order is assigned to this portal. The
  order''s account-assignment facts must be checked separately before selecting this
  destination for a particular ticket.

  '
metadata: {}
title: SEC Account Manager
url: https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: How do I use Mobile Entry tickets? | Ticketmaster Help

  - url: https://help.ticketmaster.com/hc/en-us/articles/9786597785617-How-do-I-use-Mobile-Entry-tickets

  - source: Ticketmaster Help

  - domain: help.ticketmaster.com


  ## Content


  # How do I use Mobile Entry tickets?


  For a standard Ticketmaster Mobile Entry order, tickets are accessed on a phone
  and cannot be printed from the account or delivered as ordinary PDF tickets.


  The usual Ticketmaster path is:


  1. Open the Ticketmaster app.

  2. Sign in to the Ticketmaster account connected to the order.

  3. Open **My Tickets** and locate the event.

  4. Select **View Tickets**.

  5. Add the ticket to Apple Wallet or Google Wallet when the option is available.

  6. Present the live mobile ticket for entry.


  Ticketmaster recommends adding eligible tickets to a mobile wallet before leaving
  for the event. A wallet can keep the ticket available when internet connectivity
  is weak. Screenshots are not accepted as entry credentials.


  When the Ticketmaster app is unavailable in a supported country, Ticketmaster also
  describes using a mobile web browser to access the standard account and add eligible
  tickets to a mobile wallet.


  These instructions describe the ordinary Ticketmaster account path. Some sporting
  and theatre events use separately assigned team or venue accounts, so the order''s
  actual account assignment must be established before applying this standard flow.

  '

args.reason: The order is actively assigned to the SEC namespace with scope TM-AM-SPORTS, while access is unavailable only in the standard Ticketmaster app and ticket validity remains active. The official SEC Account Manager host is https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/, so this is the evidence-based access path; screenshots or printed tickets are not a valid substitute for mobile entry.

content.content:
Rely on the **official SEC Account Manager**, not the standard Ticketmaster app:

**https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/**

Your ticket order is still active and valid, but access is unavailable in the standard Ticketmaster app. It is assigned to the SEC sports Account Manager, so:

1. Open the SEC Account Manager link in your phone’s browser.
2. Sign in with the account connected to the ticket order.
3. Open the game and display the live mobile tickets.
4. Add them to Apple Wallet or Google Wallet if offered, ideally before arriving.

Do **not** rely on screenshots or printed copies—those aren’t accepted for mobile entry. If the SEC portal also fails, go directly to the venue’s ticket assistance window with your order confirmation and photo ID.

final_answer:
Rely on the **official SEC Account Manager**, not the standard Ticketmaster app:

**https://am.ticketmaster.com/sec/**

Your ticket order is still active and valid, but access is unavailable in the standard Ticketmaster app. It is assigned to the SEC sports Account Manager, so:

1. Open the SEC Account Manager link in your phone’s browser.
2. Sign in with the account connected to the ticket order.
3. Open the game and display the live mobile tickets.
4. Add them to Apple Wallet or Google Wallet if offered, ideally before arriving.

Do **not** rely on screenshots or printed copies—those aren’t accepted for mobile entry. If the SEC portal also fails, go directly to the venue’s ticket assistance window with your order confirmation and photo ID.
